TOOL_RESULT.description: Used to inject an out-of-band result into an LLM session.
TOOL_RESULT.behavior: Handler appends to conversation and calls call_llm_resume().

INDEPENDENT.description: Used for one-shot notifications to the user interface.
INDEPENDENT.behavior: Handler sends directly to user session; may trigger LLM via 'simple' mode.

SYSTEM_EVENT.description: Low-latency passthrough for status updates, logging, or UI markers.
SYSTEM_EVENT.behavior: Handler sends directly to user session; no LLM involvement.
